subject: Cannot log in after password reset
body: I reset my password twice but the login page keeps saying 'invalid credentials'. I'm locked out of my team's board and we have a standup in an hour.

subject: Feature request: recurring tasks
body: Would love to see recurring/repeating tasks in Driftwood. Right now I clone a task every Monday by hand. No rush, just a nice-to-have.

subject: Invoice charged twice this month
body: My card was charged $49 twice on June 3rd for the same Pro subscription. Please refund the duplicate. Account billing email is on file.

subject: Board export to CSV is missing the 'assignee' column
body: When I export a board to CSV the assignee column is empty for every row, even though assignees are set in the UI. This blocks our weekly report.

subject: How do I move a task between projects?
body: Quick question — is there a way to move a task from one project to another without recreating it? Couldn't find it in the docs.

subject: Thanks for the quick fix earlier — one more thing
body: Really appreciate your team sorting out the webhook issue yesterday, you've been great. That said, this is the third week in a row something has broken in our integration and honestly my manager is asking whether we should switch tools. The Slack notifications stopped firing again this morning.

subject: Just wanted to say the new dark mode looks fantastic
body: No issue here at all! The team rolled out dark mode and it's gorgeous. Keep up the great work. Maybe mention this to the designer.

subject: API returns 500 on bulk task creation
body: POST /v2/tasks/bulk with more than ~200 items returns a 500 with no body. Smaller batches work. We're trying to migrate 10k tasks and this is a hard blocker for our launch tomorrow.

subject: Question about the data, or maybe a bug?
body: Our burndown chart shows 0 completed tasks this sprint but the task list clearly has 14 done. Not sure if I'm reading the chart wrong or if it's miscounting. Either way it's confusing the team.

subject: Please cancel my account
body: I'd like to cancel my subscription effective immediately and have my data deleted per your privacy policy. The product just isn't a fit for how we work.
